title: [merge-conflict] worker8: duty_cycle.rs
description: Resolve merge conflict in rust/lichen-core/src/duty_cycle.rs between main and integration/worker8-20260722. Keep BOTH sets of changes.
close_reason: Merged duty cycle tracker with adaptive permille logic for density-aware CCP-16 (EU/US regions, halving/doubling based on node density). Updated docs to reference worker8 changes. Code verified for no_std + heapless compatibility. Commit 3eb2e16bb
